positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~sucks(the_duster)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    vacuum(space)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    space != the_duster).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define duster(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
